name: Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter and peanut butter together in a saucepan over low heat, stirring constantly until well combined.
2. Add the vanilla extract to the melted mixture and stir until smooth.
3. In a separate bowl, mix the sugar and cocoa powder until evenly incorporated.
4. Gradually add the butter mixture to the sugar and cocoa mixture, stirring continuously until fully blended.
5. Pour the fudge batter into a 9 x 13 inch (23 x 31 cm) cake pan that has been well greased with additional butter.
6. Allow the fudge to cool completely before cutting it into squares using a sharp knife.
